name: @hewliyang/pi-codex-image
description_en: Pi extension that exposes OpenAI's hosted image_generation tool to any model, authenticated via the openai-codex (ChatGPT Plus/Pro) OAuth credential.
description_zh: Pi 扩展，将 OpenAI 托管的 image_generation 工具暴露给任何模型，通过 openai-codex (ChatGPT Plus/Pro) OAuth 凭证认证
